signedCommit.description: A signed commitment over the current state of a permissioned repo or member list. The hash is sha256 of the LtHash state. The HMAC binds the hash to a per-call IKM, which is signed by the user's atproto signing key — providing deniability on rebroadcast.

hash.description: sha256 digest of the LtHash state (32 bytes).

hmac.description: HMAC-SHA256 over hash, keyed by HKDF(ikm, info=commitInfo).

ikm.description: Per-commit input keying material (32 random bytes). Signed by the user.

sig.description: Signature over ikm by the user's atproto signing key.

rev.description: Repo revision (TID) bound into the commit info.
